response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Tool submitted successfully! We will review it soon."}

submitted_payload.name: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.tagline: Open-source workflow layer for unattended coding runs
submitted_payload.description: Free and open-source workflow layer for repo-native unattended coding runs. Ralph Workflow structures planning, execution, and review so teams wake up to finished, tested code that is ready to review instead of another confident summary.

shared_findings_used: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: primary Codeberg adoption is still flat and the loop needs fresh executable distribution, not more queue housekeeping
market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse Codeberg-first positioning and unattended-coding workflow proof
channel_discovery.json: current validated directory lanes were nearly exhausted, so a fresh autonomous submit host had real leverage
outreach-log.md: avoid repeating HN/Lobsters-only handoff or another curator-only prep cycle
why_this_action: Both curator and comparison prep queues are saturated, GitHub PR lanes are blocked by missing auth, and AI Gear Base exposed a live unauthenticated submit API that can route a fresh third-party listing directly to the primary Codeberg repo today.

summary: added aigearbase.com as a validated autonomous submit host after live HTTP 200 submission confirmation
added a regression test so future discovery runs keep this working lane in the actionable queue

measurement_window.submission_review_window: site copy says every submission is reviewed manually within seven days
measurement_window.success_signal: live AI Gear Base listing with a backlink landing on the Codeberg primary repo
